2231930.name: 梦境战斗意志 试玩版
2231930.description:
This is an exciting and interesting action adventure game. You can control monsters to fight. The game includes single-person adventure, single-person Roguelike, or 2-person duel, 5-person team adventure, 5V5 camp battle, and 20-person chaos fight!

The game is a overlooking angle battle. There will be many props in the battle. After you pass the pass, you can use the enemy defeated at this pass to fight. You need to be careful of all kinds of mechanisms in the scene!
2231930.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 土耳其语, 日语, 波兰语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
